The US has a fertility crisis, but we can easily fix it.

The fertility rate in the US is below replacement rate, at 1.78 births per woman in 2023. This is the lowest rate on record. This means that if we continue on, the US population will progressively get older and smaller. https://t.co/ERVFIeE5Us
